proposed_relations.description: Archer Avenue improved bus lanes on corridor from 150th to 160th Streets

evidence_refs.source_quote: Improve bus lane signs and install terra-cotta red bus lane markings to enhance compliance
Maintain existing 24-hour bus lane operations

rationale: Source blocks p015_c0005 and p015_c0006 explicitly describe improved bus lanes on Archer Avenue (150th-160th) as a recommendation of the Jamaica Bus Improvement Study. Treatment attaches to both the study project and the Archer Avenue corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Improve bus lane signs and install terra-cotta red bus lane markings to enhance compliance
Maintain existing 24-hour bus lane operations

quarantine.note: Cited blocks p015_c0005 ('Improve bus lane signs and install terra-cotta red bus lane markings to enhance compliance') and p015_c0006 ('Maintain existing 24-hour bus lane operations') do not state the connection to 'project_jamaica-bus-improvement-study' or 'corridor_archer-ave-busway'. Neither block mentions 'Jamaica Bus Improvement Study,' 'Archer Avenue,' or any corridor name. The connection relies on uncited slide headings (p015_c0001 'Jamaica Bus Improvement Study', p015_c0002 'Archer Avenue Improved Bus Lanes', p015_c0003 'Existing Lanes: 150 th to 160 th Streets'). Co-occurrence on the same slide is not a relation per review rules.
